summary_en: 46,000 shares (1.50% S/O) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-26 at ¥770/share (closing price 2026-05-25), maximum ¥35.42M outlay. Single-session order.
title_en: Notice on Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Floor Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-25, Japan Reliance Service Corporation's board approved a single-session block purchase of treasury stock via ToSTNeT-3 off-floor trading on 2026-05-26 at 08:45 JST. The company will acquire up to 46,000 shares (1.50% of outstanding shares) at the closing price of ¥770/share, with a maximum total outlay of ¥35.42M. The stated rationale is to enhance capital efficiency, strengthen shareholder returns, and enable flexible capital policy responsive to changes in shareholder composition and business environment. Results will be disclosed immediately after the trading window closes. The order is valid for that session only; partial or full non-execution is possible depending on market conditions.
